overall.description: First-person perspective walk through a medieval European village with stone and plastered buildings along a dirt road. High-quality game engine footage showing traditional rural architecture under a partly cloudy sky with no visible pedestrians or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the dirt road through the village, passing wooden scaffolding and stone buildings on either side

entered.detail: rough stone wall with wooden roof overhang and grass growing at the base
wooden tripod scaffolding poles and beams leaning against the wall
tall white plastered building with small windows and stone foundation
wide stone steps leading up to the building entrance
dark wooden gate or archway at the end of the street with green trees visible beyond
unpaved dirt road with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: A steady walk through a narrow medieval village street with unpaved dirt roads. Stone walls and wooden scaffolding line the left side while a large white plastered building with wide stone steps occupies the right. The path leads toward a distant gate with trees visible beyond, under a partly cloudy sky. The street is completely empty of people or vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a quiet medieval village street that leads toward an open gateway. It begins by moving steadily along an unpaved dirt road, flanked by stone walls and wooden scaffolding on the left. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal a large white plastered building with wide stone steps on the right. The path then extends forward under a partly cloudy sky, drawing the viewer closer to a distant gate with trees visible beyond the village perimeter.
